prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a project tracking app with tasks, team members, deadlines, comments, and an admin reports page.
Generate a subscription service where users can sign up, view pricing tiers, pay for premium content, and manage their profile.
Build a marketplace backend with user accounts, product listings, cart checkout, order history, and seller dashboards.
Create a learning platform with student login, course catalog, progress dashboard, quizzes, and instructor analytics.
Generate an internal admin portal that lists users, manages access rights, shows system health metrics, and allows role promotions.
Build a reporting system with login, client contacts, sales dashboard, exportable reports, and admin-only analytics.
Create a SaaS onboarding app with signup, pricing plans, payment processing, user settings, and admin revenue analytics.
Generate a customer support portal with user accounts, ticket lists, contact details, status updates, and manager dashboards.
Build a CRM that includes login, customers, notes, a dashboard, role-based permissions, and premium plan gating.
Build a simple app.
I want a website with roles and some reports, but I don't care about the layout.
Add login and payment, but no dashboard and no analytics.
Create a system where admins can see sales and users can see nothing. Conflicting requirements.
Need a CRM with contacts and premium, but no mention of auth or DB.
Build a management tool that has a dashboard, custom entities, and an analytics view, but only for admins.
Create a mobile-first app with payments, team roles, and a contacts table.
Build a portal with login, customers, plans, payments, and a page for analytics metrics.
Give me a subscription CRM with admin pages, contact management, premium gating, and a billing flow.
I want an app that has reports, roles, and a dashboard. Do not include a payment module.
